recommendations.title: Consolidate with Google Workspace
recommendations.description: Useful for teams that can standardise on Meet, Drive, Chat, and Docs.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Consolidates Notion, Slack, Zoom into Google Workspace. Validate integrations, user permissions, and data retention before cutover.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Reduces vendor sprawl, admin overhead, and overlapping seat spend.

recommendations.title: Consolidate with Microsoft 365
recommendations.description: Can consolidate chat, meetings, and file collaboration into one bundled suite.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Consolidates Microsoft Teams, Slack, Zoom into Microsoft 365. Validate integrations, user permissions, and data retention before cutover.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Reduces vendor sprawl, admin overhead, and overlapping seat spend.

recommendations.title: Switch Slack to Google Chat
recommendations.description: Simple internal chat for SMBs already on Google Workspace.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Low-friction if you can standardise on Google Workspace for docs and meetings.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Simple internal chat for SMBs already on Google Workspace.

recommendations.title: Switch Zoom to Google Meet
recommendations.description: Included in Google Workspace for many SMBs and good enough for standard team/customer calls.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Straightforward if calendars and email already run on Google.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Included in Google Workspace for many SMBs and good enough for standard team/customer calls.

recommendations.title: Consolidate with ClickUp
recommendations.description: Single PM platform that can replace multiple workflow tools.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Consolidates Asana, Jira into ClickUp. Validate integrations, user permissions, and data retention before cutover.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Reduces vendor sprawl, admin overhead, and overlapping seat spend.

recommendations.title: Switch Jira to ClickUp
recommendations.description: Broad feature coverage at lower cost with docs, tasks, and dashboards in one place.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Helpful when you want to consolidate project tooling into one platform.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Broad feature coverage at lower cost with docs, tasks, and dashboards in one place.

recommendations.title: Switch Intercom to Freshdesk
recommendations.description: Large potential savings if live chat automation is limited.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Best when ticketing is the core need and advanced automation is not heavily used.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Large potential savings if live chat automation is limited.

recommendations.title: Replace Slack with Google Chat
recommendations.description: Slack overlaps with Microsoft Teams. Google Chat is the most credible lower-cost option to validate before renewal.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Low-friction if you can standardise on Google Workspace for docs and meetings.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Simple internal chat for SMBs already on Google Workspace.

recommendations.title: Replace Zoom with Google Meet
recommendations.description: Zoom overlaps with Microsoft Teams. Google Meet is the most credible lower-cost option to validate before renewal.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Straightforward if calendars and email already run on Google.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Included in Google Workspace for many SMBs and good enough for standard team/customer calls.

recommendations.title: Replace Jira with ClickUp
recommendations.description: Jira overlaps with Asana. ClickUp is the most credible lower-cost option to validate before renewal.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Helpful when you want to consolidate project tooling into one platform.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Broad feature coverage at lower cost with docs, tasks, and dashboards in one place.

recommendations.title: Switch Notion to Google Docs
recommendations.description: Good fit if the team only needs lightweight docs and collaboration.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Best when structured wikis and databases are not essential.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Good fit if the team only needs lightweight docs and collaboration.

recommendations.title: Switch 1Password to Bitwarden
recommendations.description: Lower-cost password manager with strong business features.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Low-friction migration for most SMB password vault setups.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Lower-cost password manager with strong business features.

recommendations.title: Switch Microsoft Teams to Slack (free tier)
recommendations.description: Fast onboarding, broad integration ecosystem, and enough chat capability for many smaller teams.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Best for teams willing to accept limited message history on the free tier.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Fast onboarding, broad integration ecosystem, and enough chat capability for many smaller teams.

recommendations.title: Switch Asana to ClickUp
recommendations.description: Can replace task and project tracking at a lower price.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Strong fit if you want docs, whiteboards, and tasks together.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Can replace task and project tracking at a lower price.

recommendations.title: Replace Asana with ClickUp
recommendations.description: Asana overlaps with Jira. ClickUp is the most credible lower-cost option to validate before renewal.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Strong fit if you want docs, whiteboards, and tasks together.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Can replace task and project tracking at a lower price.

recommendations.title: Replace Notion with Google Docs
recommendations.description: Notion overlaps with Confluence, Asana. Google Docs is the most credible lower-cost option to validate before renewal.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Best when structured wikis and databases are not essential.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Good fit if the team only needs lightweight docs and collaboration.

recommendations.title: Replace Microsoft Teams with Slack (free tier)
recommendations.description: Microsoft Teams overlaps with Slack, Zoom. Slack (free tier) is the most credible lower-cost option to validate before renewal.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Best for teams willing to accept limited message history on the free tier.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Fast onboarding, broad integration ecosystem, and enough chat capability for many smaller teams.

recommendations.title: Replace Confluence with Notion
recommendations.description: Confluence overlaps with Notion. Notion is the most credible lower-cost option to validate before renewal.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Best if your team wants one flexible workspace rather than Atlassian-style admin.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Combines docs, lightweight projects, and internal wiki workflows in one simpler workspace.

recommendations.title: Switch Confluence to Notion
recommendations.description: Combines docs, lightweight projects, and internal wiki workflows in one simpler workspace.
recommendations.migrationNotes: Best if your team wants one flexible workspace rather than Atlassian-style admin.
recommendations.whyBetterForSmbs: Combines docs, lightweight projects, and internal wiki workflows in one simpler workspace.
